_description: Literal step payloads for every possible onboarding screen, grouped by path. Each entry in a steps file is one OnboardingStep the BE should return verbatim from start-session/get-current-step/submit-answer. Big catalogs (primary-role, industry, business-model, skill) are in catalogs/ and referenced by _options_source.

files.description: Steps shown to all users: welcome, data_diri, use_connectx.
All builder-path steps (founder / cofounder / team_member). Gating rules noted via _shown_when.
All startup-path steps including dynamic traction questions.
86 roles grouped across 12 categories. Used by q_primary_role, q_roles_needed.
67 industries grouped across 7 categories. Used by q_industries_interest.
36 business models grouped across 7 categories. Used by q_business_model.
80 skills grouped across 12 categories. Used by q_skills and q_skills_needed.
